name: agent-knowledge-and-tool-injection
description: Prevents agents from silently operating without relevant domain knowledge or with a stale tool set when knowledge and tools are loaded at startup rather than resolved per request. TRIGGER when: injecting domain or repository knowledge into agent prompts, integrating external tool servers whose tools may change at runtime, agent silently produces wrong output because user phrasing missed a trigger, building a system where knowledge sources or external tools are added post-deployment.
author: OpenHands
